article_meta.title: New York Playbook POLITICO's must-read briefing informing the daily conversation among knowledgeable New Yorkers New Yor

reasoning: The summary mostly uses neutral, attributed language and avoids inheriting charged rhetoric from the article. One mild lapse appears in calling algorithmic feeds’ “addictive nature” without attribution, but other evaluative claims are clearly ascribed to Gounardes or Meta. However, the model omits many other perspectives and topics in the newsletter, focusing almost exclusively on one segment.

custom_reasoning.spin: Verbs like “pushing,” “opposes,” “argues,” and “counters” are neutral and mostly attributed.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: The phrase “addictive nature of algorithmic feeds” is presented without attribution; other claims are attributed.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: One subjective characterization (“addictive nature”) appears as fact; otherwise positions are ascribed to sources.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Tone is measured; no alarmist phrasing beyond the single “addictive” reference.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks in the model’s voice; criticisms are attributed to Gounardes.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about internal motivations except when attributed to Gounardes’ view.
custom_reasoning.slant: Slight tilt via concluding sentence echoing critics’ framing; otherwise includes both Meta and lawmaker perspectives.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: The newsletter includes multiple major items (lobbying/ethics, child care coalitions, abortion messaging, redistricting, campaign launches) that are entirely omitted.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Use of “addictive” as a descriptor is subjective; rest of adjectives are neutral.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Politically neutral terminology throughout; no ideologically loaded labels.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: No disproportionate emphasis on negative outcomes versus the source.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No undue deference to elites or dismissal of grassroots; both corporate and legislative views included.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Overall neutral and attributed; minimal inheritance of loaded framing.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Focuses on one segment of a multi-topic brief, leaving out other distinct perspectives present in the source.
